goals.text: Leg press 220 lbs for 10 reps with proper breathing technique
goals.notes: No Valsalva — diaphragmatic breathing throughout. Blood pressure-safe progression is the priority.

goals.text: 30-minute brisk walk 5 days per week consistently for 8 weeks
goals.notes: Cardiovascular health and BP management. His doctor recommended 150 min/week aerobic activity.

goals.text: Hold McGill plank variation for 60 seconds without breath-holding
goals.notes: Core stability is the foundation of his back-safe training. This benchmark confirms readiness for heavier loads.

goals.text: Cable row 70 lbs for 3 sets of 10 with full scapular retraction
goals.notes: Exceeded timeline by 1 week. Upper back strength supporting his disc recovery well.
